svg.title: Synalux POS — loyalty checkin
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for loyalty checkin. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Scan your loyalty QR or Apple Wallet pass
Check-in +10 pts awarded · 10% Gold discount auto-applied
Prefers window table. Regular Friday visitor.
David has referred 3 friends — 150 bonus pts earned via referral program
Send welcome SMS · Print guest slip · Flag allergy for kitchen
Tap or scan at host stand
Sign up at loyalty kiosk / online / QR
60-second enrollment at host stand or web
SMS / email with wallet pass link sent instantly
Guest adds to Apple Wallet / Google Wallet
One tap — lives on their phone's lock screen
Tap NFC reader OR show QR at host stand
Pass auto-updates: points balance, tier, active offers
No app required — updates push silently to Wallet
Requires NFC reader at host stand
Alert guest when points added or tier changes
